briefdescription.para: Configuration attributes for batch normalization backward pass.

detaileddescription.para: BatchnormBackwardAttributes configures the backward pass of batch normalization, computing gradients with respect to the input, scale, and bias.

listitem.para: DY: Gradient of the loss with respect to the output (upstream gradient)
X: Original input tensor from forward pass
Mean: Saved mean from forward pass
Inv_variance: Saved inverse variance from forward pass
DX: Gradient with respect to input
DScale: Gradient with respect to scale (gamma)
DBias: Gradient with respect to bias (beta)
